# Obsidian Ridge Labs

> Boutique mobile app studio specializing in private, offline-first AI architecture for Apple devices.

- [Full content](https://obsidianridgelabs.com/llms-full.txt): Complete text of all products, help guides, and articles for retrieval and model ingestion.

## About

Obsidian Ridge Labs builds AI-powered mobile apps that run their intelligence entirely on-device. We reject the cloud-first model. Our apps use on-device language models, Apple's Neural Engine, and local storage so features work without shipping your data to a server. No telemetry. No accounts. No required cloud sync.

Our mission: give people the power of modern AI without surrendering their privacy.

## Products

### Vault (Smart Finance) — Live
Private AI finance tracker for iPhone and iPad. Analyzes spending with AI that runs on your device, so no cloud is required to use it. Track everything by hand and it never leaves the device, or optionally link a bank through Plaid for automatic updates — your bank login happens on Plaid's secure screen and your password never touches Vault. Features on-device transaction categorization that learns from your corrections, safe-to-spend guidance, budgets, goals, debt and net-worth tracking, cash-flow forecasting, a conversational AI coach, receipt scanning, and PDF/CSV statement import. Biometric (Face ID) lock. Requires iOS 17 or later.
- URL: https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/vault
- Help: https://obsidianridgelabs.com/help/vault
- Category: Finance
- Pricing: Free; optional paid bank sync via Plaid
- Key differentiator: On-device AI analysis with no mandatory cloud. Bank linking is optional and credentials never reach the app.

### Echo Chamber (Offline AI Transcription) — Live
Private, offline transcription app for iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Watch that records, transcribes, and summarizes audio entirely on-device. Powered by the Parakeet TDT v3 neural engine on Apple's Neural Engine, with a WhisperKit fallback on lighter hardware and Apple's system speech on iOS 26+. Real-time speech-to-text in 25 European languages with automatic detection. AI meeting summaries in 6 formats (Cornell Notes, Outline, Meeting Minutes, Bullet Summary, Q&A Interview, Executive Summary) generated on-device via Apple Intelligence or the bundled Cedar model. AI Chat over your transcript, automatic speaker diarization with learning voice profiles, 8 export formats (plain text, timestamped text, SRT, VTT, Markdown, JSON, PDF, DOCX), audio/video import, Face ID lock, full-text search, Spotlight, widgets, and Live Activities. Optional encrypted iCloud sync (off by default; audio is AES-256-GCM encrypted at rest). Built for lawyers, doctors, and executives who need confidentiality. Requires iOS 18 or later.
- URL: https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/echochamber
- Help: https://obsidianridgelabs.com/help/echochamber
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/echo-chamber-ai-transcription/id6761675060
- Category: Productivity / Offline Transcription
- Pricing: Free; Pro from $4.99/mo, $39.99/yr, or $79.99 lifetime
- Key differentiator: A complete offline transcription stack — on-device AI transcription, 6 AI summary formats, AI chat, and speaker learning with zero cloud dependency.

### Molehill (Focus & Tasks) — Coming soon
On-device AI focus app for iPhone that turns overwhelming tasks into the one small step that comes next. Built for ADHD and anyone who freezes at a long to-do list. Brain-dump capture sorts into six life areas; Apple's on-device Foundation Models break a task into concrete, verb-first steps at your chosen granularity (Big Picture, Balanced, or Every Tiny Step), with a deterministic heuristic fallback when Apple Intelligence isn't available. Full-screen Focus mode shows just the next step with an optional gentle timer (5/10/15/25 min), a Next Step Lock Screen and Home Screen widget, a Dynamic Island Live Activity, Siri/Shortcuts intents, and a Share Extension for quick capture. No streaks, no shame. Every bit of AI runs on the device — no account, no servers, works in airplane mode. Requires iOS 26.
- URL: https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/molehill
- Help: https://obsidianridgelabs.com/help/molehill
- Category: Productivity / Focus
- Pricing: Free (3 AI actions/day); Pro from $2.99/mo, $19.99/yr, or $39.99 lifetime
- Key differentiator: On-device executive-function support that shows one step at a time, with no tracking and no guilt mechanics.

### Mind Palace (Personal Growth) — In development
Concept for a private AI journal that finds patterns across your entries on-device. Not yet released.
- URL: https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/mind
- Category: Journaling / Mental Health

### Decision Nexus (Strategic Logic) — In development
Concept for a visual decision-mapping tool with an on-device "Red Team" AI that stress-tests your plans. Not yet released.
- URL: https://obsidianridgelabs.com/apps/nexus
- Category: Strategy / Decision Making

## Philosophy

Obsidian Ridge Labs operates on four core axioms:

1. **Data Gravity** — Data must remain where it is created. Once data moves, it is vulnerable.
2. **Nullius in Verba** — "Take nobody's word for it." Verification is behavioral: judge a system by what it refuses to exfiltrate.
3. **Offline Default** — Connectivity is a feature, not a requirement. Intelligence should function anywhere.
4. **Ephemerality** — Digital permanence is a bug. Systems should know how to forget.

## Technology

- On-device language models (Apple Foundation Models on supported hardware; bundled Cedar / llama.cpp models elsewhere)
- Apple Neural Engine for local inference
- On-device transcription via Parakeet TDT v3 and WhisperKit (Echo Chamber)
- Local-first storage (SwiftData / Core Data), encrypted at rest by the operating system; Echo Chamber audio is AES-256-GCM encrypted
- No analytics SDKs, no crash-reporting SDKs, no advertising identifiers
- The only network calls are optional and user-initiated: Plaid bank sync (Vault) and personal iCloud sync (Echo Chamber)
